title: FIND CHILD CARE OREGON - 211info
text: FIND CHILD CARE OREGON FIND CHILD CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families locate child care through referrals and provides resources to help make informed decisions about child care needs. 211info is available to provide families referrals to support their child care search, or families can conduct their own search on the website. Website Eligibility: Parents/caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 Main phone 898211 Text Short Code Text keyword children Helpline 211 Text Short Code 898211 Text keyword children Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, text, or visit website for more information FEES: None for referrals DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps Child Care Complaints Child Care Expense Assistance Child Care Expense Assistance * Native American Community Child Care Provider Recruitment Child Care Provider Referrals Child Care Provider Training Child Care Provider Training * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Child Care Providers Early Head Start Early Head Start * Migrants Early Head Start * Native American Community Facility Licensing * Child Care Issues Head Start Head Start * Migrants Head Start * Native American Community Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Child Care Issues Preschool Referral Programs Preschools Preschools * Disabilities Issues Preschools * Migrants Student Disability Services * Child Care Issues Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Child Care Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
